description: Replaces or upgrades the background of an existing jewelry product photo with a premium, luxury-grade studio or lifestyle environment. The jewelry and its immediate foreground surface are preserved pixel-perfectly — only the background changes.

master_prompt.system_role: Act as a world-class luxury product photography retoucher and CGI environment specialist. You specialize in seamlessly replacing backgrounds in existing jewelry photographs to produce premium, commercially-publishable images. Your backgrounds are not flat digital textures — they are three-dimensional environments with convincing depth, realistic lighting gradients, and physical plausibility. The key technical challenge is making the new background look like the jewelry was photographed in that environment from the very beginning — not composited or cut-out pasted. This requires: matching the color temperature of the background light to the jewelry's existing highlights; creating physically plausible shadows and ambient occlusion where the jewelry meets the new background; and maintaining the existing foreground surface (velvet, marble, wooden counter) in its original state.
master_prompt.camera_settings: Preserve the exact camera perspective, focal length, aperture depth-of-field, and composition of the source jewelry image. Do not alter the crop. The new background must recede into the distance in a way consistent with the focal length and aperture of the source — a macro lens (100mm, f/11) produces a relatively flat background with minimal bokeh, while a 50mm at f/2.8 produces more background blur. Match accordingly.
master_prompt.environment: Choose the new background based on the requested style variant (listed in child_prompts below). In all cases, the background must feel photorealistic and physically plausible — not digital, not filtered, not obviously AI-generated. The transition between the jewelry's foreground surface and the new background must be seamless — no harsh cutline, no obvious edge, no halo artifact around the jewelry or surface edge.
master_prompt.lighting_and_physics: CRITICAL ENVIRONMENT-JEWELRY LIGHT MATCHING: (1) The new background must produce ambient fill light on the jewelry's metal surfaces consistent with the background's color palette — a warm golden-hour background should introduce warm amber bounce into the jewelry's shadow side; a cool blue studio background should introduce cool fill light. (2) Any new background light sources (windows, candles, neon, daylight) must cast logical reflections on the jewelry's metal, even if subtle. (3) The jewelry's contact shadow on the foreground surface must remain intact and unchanged — do not alter the contact shadow. (4) If the background introduces a strong directional light (sunset, window), a subtle rim or edge highlight should appear on the jewelry's top edge, consistent with that light direction.
master_prompt.preservation_lock: FOREGROUND PRESERVATION MANDATE: (1) The jewelry piece itself must be preserved pixel-perfectly — zero changes to the metal, gemstones, prongs, design, or finish. (2) The foreground surface the jewelry rests on (velvet, marble, wood, acrylic, glass) must be preserved and retained in the image — only the area behind and around the surface changes. (3) The contact shadow between the jewelry and the foreground surface is preserved exactly. (4) Do not introduce new reflections of the jewelry on the foreground surface unless they were present in the original. (5) The jewelry must not appear to float — it must remain grounded to the foreground surface.
master_prompt.negative_prompt: Jewelry design altered, gemstone color changed, metal color changed, foreground surface texture changed, jewelry contact shadow removed, jewelry floating above surface, cutline visible around jewelry, halo artifact at background edge, background bleeding through jewelry, background too uniform/flat/digital, background physically impossible for the scene (studio backdrop contradicts lifestyle setting), color temperature mismatch between jewelry and background, background too busy/distracting from jewelry, text in background, logos, watermarks.

white_seamless_studio.background_description: A pure, photographic-quality white seamless paper background — the gold standard of product photography. The white has a warm, slightly cream-toned quality (not harsh digital white — approximately 245/245/245 RGB rather than 255/255/255 pure white, preventing overblown-looking whites). A gentle gradient exists: the area directly behind the jewelry is slightly lighter than the edges of the frame. The transition from the foreground surface to the white background is a smooth, professional infinity-sweep curve — not a hard line. There is a very subtle, natural-looking vignette at the extreme frame corners to prevent the image feeling flat.
white_seamless_studio.light_integration: The white background acts as a large fill reflector, bouncing soft, neutral-white light into all surfaces of the jewelry. This creates beautiful, even illumination with balanced shadow detail. All metal surfaces pick up a subtle whitish-neutral fill on their shadow sides.

black_reflective_acrylic.background_description: A highly polished black acrylic or obsidian glass surface extending infinitely behind the jewelry. The surface is so smooth and reflective that a mirrored reflection of the jewelry appears below the jewelry's position — a perfect inverted copy, fading to black within 2–3cm. The background itself is a deep, rich black with a very subtle blue-black gradient that prevents it from feeling flat. The infinity of the black creates a dramatic, high-contrast look that makes metal shine and gemstones glow with maximum intensity.
black_reflective_acrylic.light_integration: The black background absorbs ambient light and prevents background wash-out, forcing the jewelry's metal highlights to appear extremely bright by contrast. Gold appears as bright warm gold against deep black. Gemstones fire with maximum brilliance — their fire reads with extraordinary clarity against the dark background. The reflection beneath the piece is mirror-quality at the contact point, fading to full black within 30–40mm.

marble_luxury.background_description: A premium Italian Carrara marble surface — white and cream body with fine, organic gray-silver veining running diagonally across the composition. The marble has a natural matte-satin finish — not a high-gloss mirror, but with a subtle warmth and depth. Fine grain texture is visible at macro level. The marble surface extends both as the foreground (where the jewelry rests) and as the background wall — either flat lay on a marble table with a marble wall background, or a gentle marble slab sweep from horizontal to vertical. The veining pattern is natural and organic, never perfectly straight or uniform.
marble_luxury.light_integration: Marble's cool neutral tones complement diamonds, white gold, and platinum. The marble introduces very subtle cool-gray ambient fill. Any warm gold jewelry will appear warmer and richer by contrast with the cool marble surface. Marble surface shows soft, natural reflections of the jewelry piece — not a full mirror reflection, but a warm diffuse glow.

dark_velvet.background_description: A rich, deeply-saturated jewel-tone velvet surface — choose from: (A) Midnight Navy (deep blue-black velvet with rich cool undertone), (B) Emerald Velvet (deep bottle green), (C) Burgundy Velvet (deep wine red), or (D) Black Velvet (deep onyx black with subtle warm purple undertone). The velvet's micro-fiber texture is visible when lit from the side — each fiber casting a tiny shadow, giving the surface incredible tactile depth. The velvet background runs vertically behind the piece (like a velvet-lined jewelry box or display cabinet background).
dark_velvet.light_integration: Velvet absorbs light directionally — it looks darker when lit from front, richer and more textured when lit from the side. The side-lit velvet background gives the entire image a luxurious, boutique-showcase quality. Gemstones and metal highlights pop dramatically against the absorbent velvet background.

golden_hour_outdoor.background_description: A warm, naturally-lit outdoor golden hour environment. The background is a soft, heavily out-of-focus (bokeh) scene of late afternoon warm sunlight filtering through trees or bouncing off a warm architectural surface (stone wall, terracotta tiles, sand). The background colors are predominantly warm amber, golden yellow, and soft orange — consistent with 3500–4000K golden hour light temperature. The foreground surface (where the jewelry rests) is a light-toned natural material — sand, light stone, bleached wood, or pale travertine — receiving warm golden sidelight.
golden_hour_outdoor.light_integration: Warm golden hour light introduces a beautiful warm amber rim highlight on the jewelry's top and back edges — making yellow gold absolutely glow. Even white gold and platinum pick up a warm golden-edge highlight. Gemstone fire in this warm light shifts subtly warmer — diamonds and moissanites fire with orange-gold tones at their brightest facets.

luxury_interior_lifestyle.background_description: An upscale interior environment with natural daylight flooding in from a large window. The background shows elements of luxury living: white marble floor, warm-white plastered wall, a bouquet of white flowers out-of-focus in the far background, or architectural molding details. The jewelry rests on a luxury surface in this scene — a white marble countertop, a warm-toned oak drawer chest surface, or a glass display shelf. The light is natural daylight (5600K) entering from the left or right window, creating a beautiful directional soft light with long, gentle shadows.
luxury_interior_lifestyle.light_integration: Natural daylight creates crisp, directional light with beautiful, soft-edged shadows (shadow edge spread depends on window size — large window = very soft shadows). The daylight color temperature (5600K) gives all metals a neutral to slightly cool appearance. Diamonds and moissanites look brilliant and clean. Colored gemstones appear true-to-color under the neutral daylight.

transparent_clean.background_description: A perfect, professional product cutout — the jewelry and its immediate foreground surface are extracted from the original background and placed against a clean, featureless white ground (suitable for PNG export or e-commerce listing). The edge quality of the extraction is extremely precise: no halo, no fringe, no missing pixels at thin chain links or prong tips. The contact shadow beneath the jewelry is preserved as a soft, natural gray shadow on the white ground. This is an e-commerce-ready image, suitable for Amazon, Shopify, or any marketplace requiring a white background.
transparent_clean.light_integration: On the white ground, a subtle, natural soft drop shadow replaces the original contact shadow (or extends it naturally). The shadow is a diffused neutral-gray ellipse approximately 30% opacity, spread 3–5mm from the jewelry base, falling away from the primary studio light direction.

usage_notes: This workflow requires the source jewelry product image as input. The AI should identify the background and foreground surface in the image, preserve the foreground surface and jewelry with zero modification, and replace only the background region with the requested environment style. Specify the desired background style in the user instruction field.
